title: T-019 — API: cascade DAG generation rule (cascade_generation_v1)
prompt:
Implement intermediate cascade generation per PRD §8.4 as DSL rule `cascade_generation_v1` in 02-SETTINGS rule registry. Algorithm: starting from primary FG WO, traverse BOM children whose product type='intermediate', recursively create child WOs (status='DRAFT', source_of_demand='intermediate_cascade', source_reference=parent.wo_id). Insert wo_dependencies rows linking parent.wo_outputs to child.wo_materials with material_source='upstream_wo_output'. wo.numbering uses T-017 with appropriate suffix per product. Co-products + byproducts inserted into parent wo_outputs (FR-PLAN-021).

Idempotent (V-PLAN-WO-006): if cascade already generated for source_reference, skip. Safety cap intermediate_cascade_max_depth from planning_settings (V-PLAN-SET-002). Cycle check before insert via DFS (T-020).

RED test: 3-layer BOM yields 3 WOs + 2 dependency edges, re-run idempotent (no dupes), depth>cap returns 400.

pipeline_inputs.description: Multi-layer cascade WO generation with idempotency + depth cap + dependency edge insertion.
pipeline_inputs.details: Rule definition under `src/rules/planning/v1/cascade_generation_v1.json`. Engine evaluates at WO creation hook (T-018 emits trigger). Service implementation in `src/server/services/cascade-generator.ts` performs the DAG traversal in a DFS with visited-set to detect cycles; on cycle, throws CycleError with cycle path. Generates wo_outputs rows for co-products + byproducts (FR-PLAN-021) using bom_outputs.allocation_pct snapshot. Atomic: all child WOs created in a single transaction; if any fails, all rollback.
acceptance_criteria: Given a BOM with 3 intermediate layers (FG → I1 → I2 → RM), when createWorkOrder for FG runs, then 3 WOs are created and 2 wo_dependencies edges are inserted (FG←I1, I1←I2).
Given the cascade run twice for same source_reference, when second run completes, then no duplicate WOs are created (V-PLAN-WO-006 idempotent).
Given a BOM with chain length 11 and intermediate_cascade_max_depth=10, when cascade runs, then HTTP 400 with code 'V-PLAN-SET-002'.
Given `pnpm vitest run src/server/services/__tests__/cascade-generator.test.ts`, when run, then 0 failures.
test_strategy: RED tests for 3-layer generation, idempotency on re-run, depth-cap rejection, dependency edge correctness.
risk_red_lines: Do not allow cycles to be inserted — V-PLAN-WO-005 hard block; service must abort with CycleError before any insert.
Do not mutate BOM during traversal — read-only.
Do not split cascade across multiple transactions — partial cascade is a data-integrity hazard.
